About me

I build things that actually work.

I'm a full-stack software engineer finishing my Master's in Computer Science at the University of North Texas (May 2026). I build scalable systems, design clean APIs, and care deeply about software that performs reliably in production — not just in a demo.

At TeckTown LLC I shipped production features end-to-end: React component libraries, Node/Express REST APIs with ~20% latency improvement, optimized SQL workflows, and automated pipelines cutting manual effort by 30%. Before that, at SmartInternz, I built Apex-based Salesforce CRM workflows in Agile sprints.

At UNT I've applied Apache Spark for big data ML pipelines (breast cancer classifier at 99.36% accuracy), researched AutoFE and NLP for fake news detection (92% accuracy), and studied containerized software testing strategies. I'm equally comfortable on the frontend, backend, data layer, or the test suite.

I also ran an Instagram content channel for 4+ years — growing to 100K+ views through data-driven strategy and performance analytics. I understand audiences, metrics, and what it takes to build something people actually engage with.
